div.class: vp-page-header d-flex align-items-start justify-content-between flex-wrap gap-3 mb-4

div.p: Welcome back. Here's an overview of your account activity.
Submit your first invoice to get started.
Track the status of all your submitted invoices.

div.span: Your invoice has been submitted successfully. We will review it shortly.

a.t-attf-class: vp-btn vp-btn-sm #{'vp-btn-primary' if not active_state else 'vp-btn-outline'}

div.p: No invoices match your current filter.

div.t-attf-class: vp-tracker-step #{'done' if invoice.state in ('submitted','review','approved') else ('active' if invoice.state == 'submitted' else '')}
vp-tracker-step #{'done' if invoice.state == 'approved' else ('active' if invoice.state == 'review' else ('rejected' if invoice.state == 'rejected' else ''))}
vp-tracker-step #{'done' if invoice.state == 'approved' else ('rejected' if invoice.state == 'rejected' else '')}

div.p: No comments yet. Our team will leave feedback here once review begins.
Fill in the details below and attach your invoice document.

div.class: alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show d-flex align-items-center gap-2

textarea.name: notes
textarea.placeholder: Any additional information for our team...

div.div: Click to browse or drag & drop your file
Supported: PDF, JPG, PNG — Max 10 MB

div.class: d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between mt-3 flex-wrap gap-2

div.p: Confirmed purchase orders issued to your company.
No confirmed purchase orders found for your account.
